query_normalized: assessing the validity of statistical significance in randomized controlled trials with missing data statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the validity (Type I error control and statistical power) of a statistical testing mechanism in the specific domain of data with missing values, which is the core construct of the user's question regarding statistical significance under missing data conditions.
